product_overview: A Mauritania-focused service marketplace that connects clients with local workers (electricians, plumbers, cleaners, etc.). Identity and authentication are phone-number-based; workers and clients can browse listings, manage worker profiles/availability, and submit ratings after completed work.
core_goals: Browse and discover local workers by trade and location so users can find help quickly.
Inspect a worker's profile, services, availability and ratings to evaluate suitability.
Allow workers to manage their public availability and profile details so they can receive bookings.
Let clients submit ratings and feedback for workers after a completed job to build reputation.
Enable authenticated users to manage tasks and bookings (create, accept, complete) as part of the service lifecycle.

features.name: Browse Workers (Get All Workers)
features.description: Discover a list of available workers, apply filters (trade, location, availability) and browse summaries before viewing full profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /workers -> See a list of workers with summary info (trade, short bio, rating, availability) -> Apply a filter by trade or location -> See the list narrowed to matching workers -> Select a worker to inspect details
Navigate to /workers -> Use search or quick-filters to find a specific trade -> See filtered results and recent reviews for matching workers

features.name: View Worker Details (Get Worker By ID)
features.description: Open a selected worker's full profile to view services offered, full availability, photo, ratings and recent reviews.
user_flows: Navigate to /workers -> Select a worker from the list -> See the worker's full profile including services, availability status, rating summary and recent reviews
Navigate to /workers -> Select a worker -> View the worker's service pricing and contact/booking options

features.name: Update Worker Availability
features.description: Allow an authenticated worker to publish or hide their availability so clients know when they can be booked.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Access your account settings -> Open availability settings -> Set availability status or adjust availability schedule -> Save changes -> See confirmation and updated availability shown on your profile

Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Access availability settings -> Attempt to save an availability schedule with overlapping or invalid times -> See validation error and correct the schedule

features.name: Update Worker Profile
features.description: Enable authenticated workers to edit their public profile (display name, services, hourly rate, profile image, short bio) so listings stay accurate.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Open profile editing -> Update fields such as display name, services offered, hourly rate and profile photo -> Submit profile updates -> See updated profile reflect the new values
Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Open profile editing -> Submit the form with required fields missing -> See field-level validation errors and correct the inputs

features.name: Rate Worker
features.description: Allow clients to submit a star rating and optional comment for a worker after a completed job to contribute to the worker's public reputation.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Open the completed task or booking record -> Choose the worker who performed the job -> Enter a star rating and optional comment -> Submit the rating -> See the rating reflected on the worker's profile and aggregated rating updated

Navigate to /login -> Authenticate with phone number and password -> Open a completed task -> Attempt to submit a rating without selecting a star value -> See a validation error prompting to select a rating

features.name: Get All Workers
features.description: Retrieve a list of workers with optional filtering.

features.name: Get Worker By ID
features.description: Retrieve details of a specific worker by ID.

features.name: Update Worker Availability
features.description: Update the availability status of the authenticated worker.

features.name: Update Worker Profile
features.description: Update the profile details of the authenticated worker.

features.name: Rate Worker
features.description: Submit a rating for a specific worker.
